name: SAL_SET_VECTORS
condition: vector type MCA/INIT/BOOT_RENDEZ; 16-byte aligned handlers; checksum length rules
behavior: stores SAL vector descriptors
test_split: nominal path plus listed special cases

name: SAL_GET_STATE_INFO
behavior: returns no information for valid type
test_split: nominal path plus listed special cases

name: SAL_GET_STATE_INFO_SIZE
behavior: returns zero size for valid type
test_split: nominal path plus listed special cases

name: SAL_CLEAR_STATE_INFO
behavior: successfully clears synthetic state
test_split: nominal path plus listed special cases

name: SAL_MC_RENDEZ
behavior: success; nonzero args return SAL_STATUS_ERROR
test_split: nominal path plus listed special cases

name: SAL_MC_SET_PARAMS
condition: param type rendez interrupt/wakeup/CPE with mechanism-specific validation
behavior: records machine-check parameter record
test_split: nominal path plus listed special cases

name: SAL_REGISTER_PHYSICAL_ADDR
behavior: records physical PAL proc address
test_split: nominal path plus listed special cases

name: SAL_CACHE_FLUSH
behavior: successfully acknowledges cache flush
test_split: nominal path plus listed special cases

name: SAL_CACHE_INIT
behavior: successfully acknowledges cache init
test_split: nominal path plus listed special cases

name: SAL_PCI_CONFIG_READ
condition: compact or extended PCI config address; size 1/2/4 and aligned
behavior: returns config value or all ones for nonexistent function
test_split: nominal path plus listed special cases

name: SAL_PCI_CONFIG_WRITE
condition: compact or extended PCI config address; size 1/2/4 and aligned
behavior: writes config value or ignores nonexistent function
test_split: nominal path plus listed special cases

name: SAL_FREQ_BASE
behavior: platform clock returns 100000000; optional clocks return -1 values
test_split: nominal path plus listed special cases

name: SAL_PHYSICAL_ID_INFO
behavior: returns zeroed physical ID info
test_split: nominal path plus listed special cases

name: SAL_UPDATE_PAL
condition: parameter buffer nonzero 16-byte aligned; scratch args consistent; reserved zero
behavior: valid request returns write-failure error
test_split: nominal path plus listed special cases

name: SAL runtime entry
condition: caller is not CPL0 or runtime translation state is inconsistent
behavior: returns SAL_STATUS_ERROR before function dispatch
test_split: CPL0 runtime-valid vs invalid runtime state

name: SAL_UNKNOWN
behavior: returns SAL_STATUS_NOT_IMPLEMENTED
test_split: unknown function id

name: SAL_SET_VECTORS INIT pair
condition: OS_INIT vector has only one of primary/secondary handlers present
behavior: invalid because INIT requires both vectors present or both absent
test_split: INIT one-vector vs two-vector vs no-vector

name: SAL_SET_VECTORS checksum
condition: checksum-valid bit set in length field
behavior: length must be nonzero 16-byte multiple and reserved bits clear
test_split: checksum-valid length/reserved combinations

name: SAL_MC_RENDEZ nonzero
behavior: implemented path returns SAL_STATUS_ERROR
test_split: all-zero success vs nonzero error

name: SAL_MC_SET_PARAMS interrupt
condition: mechanism is interrupt for rendez or CPE
behavior: vector zero or 0x10..0xff accepted with valid options
test_split: valid vector, low reserved vector, bad options

name: SAL_MC_SET_PARAMS memory
behavior: requires 8-byte aligned memory address and valid options
test_split: aligned vs unaligned memory wakeup

name: SAL_PCI_CONFIG_READ compact
behavior: decodes compact address and reads ECAM if present
returns: success with data or all ones
test_split: valid device, nonexistent device, bad alignment

name: SAL_PCI_CONFIG_READ extended
behavior: decodes extended address and reads ECAM if present
returns: success with data or all ones
test_split: valid extended offset, bad upper bits, bad size

name: SAL_PCI_CONFIG_WRITE compact
behavior: writes ECAM if present; ignores nonexistent function
test_split: present vs nonexistent function write

name: SAL_PCI_CONFIG_WRITE extended
behavior: writes ECAM if present; validates extended address bits
test_split: extended valid vs invalid decode

name: SAL_FREQ_BASE platform
behavior: returns platform base frequency 100000000
test_split: platform clock type

name: SAL_FREQ_BASE optional
behavior: returns -1 values to indicate optional frequency unavailable
test_split: processor/bus optional clock types

name: SAL_UPDATE_PAL write-failure
behavior: implemented path reports write failure rather than applying update
test_split: valid failure vs invalid args
